issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Extract contacts from email text into a validated Pydantic schema with retries
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses instructor.from_openai(OpenAI()), passes response_model=ExtractedContacts and max_retries=3, and leverages Field(description=...) to guide extraction; baseline calls OpenAI directly with json_mode and a hand-rolled parser, missing Instructor's validation-retry loop.

scenarios.name: Stream partial sentiment-analysis objects from a local Ollama model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses instructor.from_openai with base_url='http://localhost:11434/v1' and mode=instructor.Mode.JSON, defines Literal-typed fields for sentiment/emotions, and iterates client.chat.completions.create_partial; baseline streams raw text from Ollama and tries to parse JSON manually.
